who: accountants at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
offer: For accountants at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual reconciliation causes compliance risks and potential penalties. We simplify report generation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate or delayed trust account reconciliation reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accountants seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to accountants with a brief demo video
Participate in community forums for accountants sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for initial data input and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data entries
One-click export for generating simple reports
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
